title: Environmental science and technology - Canada.ca
content:
## Environmental science and technology

## Environmental science and technology
Environment and Climate Change Canada’s scientific and technical knowledge is made available here to users of science and technology, including governments, environmental regulators, policy- and decision-makers, land-use planners, researchers, and industry.

## Services and information
Our scientists answer questions from the public on environmental issues.

### Spotlight on science
Find out about our scientists and the extraordinary projects they’re passionate about.
Advancing reconciliation in science and research activities.
Making Environment and Climate Change Canada science more transparent, accessible and inclusive.
Vision, directions, and values to guide ECCC’s science activities and priorities.

### Coastal shoreline surveys
Supporting your physical, mental and spiritual health through healthy eating, physical activity and more.

### Environmental contamination and response seminar
Forum on preventing, assessing and cleaning up spills of oil and hazardous materials in the environment.

### Environmental science centres
Environment and Climate Change Canada science and technology facilities.

### Directory of scientists and professionals in Canada
Access the directory of scientists and research professionals from twelve government institutions.

### Workshop on emerging applications in environmental analysis and food safety
The next high-resolution mass spectrometry (HRMS) and liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC-MS) workshop will be held in 2027.

Thank you for your feedback.
